emergencyInfo.notes: Ensure ESTA is printed and valid. All hotel reservations have been added. iCloud Budget Sheet: https://www.icloud.com/numbers/049Fp8ziIAp-0vaCNuU40m0-w#Budget_USA

steps.title: Departure & Arrival in New York
steps.description: Flight BF720 from Paris Orly (ORY) Terminal 4 to Newark (EWR) Terminal B. Train transit to SoHo hotel check-in.

items.title: Flight BF720 (ORY to EWR)
items.details: Terminal 4, Paris Orly. Arrival Newark at 9:00 PM. French bee airlines.

items.title: Newark Airport Express Train
items.details: Take AirTrain from Terminal B to Newark Airport Station, then NJ Transit train to NY Penn Station.

items.title: Four Points by Sheraton Manhattan SoHo Village
items.details: Check-in confirmation: 5940.725.103. PIN: 2628. SoHo location. Late arrival request submitted.

mapPlace.name: Four Points by Sheraton Manhattan SoHo Village
mapPlace.address: 66 Charlton Street, SoHo, New York, NY 10014, United States
mapPlace.description: Premium hotel located in SoHo. Cozy rooms with two queen beds, free wired internet, and steps away from the subway.

steps.title: Central Park & Museum of Natural History
steps.description: Matin: Musée d'histoire naturelle. Midi: Central Park cookies & Apple Store. Afternoon: Top of the Rock, Grand Central and Library.

items.title: Museum of Natural History
items.details: Requires New York CityPASS entry reservation.

mapPlace.name: American Museum of Natural History
mapPlace.address: 200 Central Park West, New York, NY 10024, United States
mapPlace.description: A world-renowned scientific and cultural institution. Explore the dinosaur halls, ocean life, and the Hayden Planetarium.

items.title: Top of the Rock Observation Deck
items.details: Rockefeller Center. Beautiful sunset views over Manhattan.

mapPlace.name: Top of the Rock
mapPlace.address: 30 Rockefeller Plaza, New York, NY 10112, United States
mapPlace.description: Breathtaking 360-degree panoramic views of New York City, including Central Park and the Empire State Building.

steps.title: High Line, Chelsea & Times Square
steps.description: Matin: Musée de l'air et de l'espace. Midi: High Line, Little Island, Chelsea Market. Soir: Empire State Building, Broadway, Times Square.

items.title: Intrepid Air & Space Museum
items.details: Pier 86, W 46th St. CityPASS entry.

mapPlace.name: Intrepid Museum
mapPlace.address: Pier 86, W 46th St, New York, NY 10036, United States
mapPlace.description: Historical aircraft carrier museum showcasing the space shuttle Enterprise, British Airways Concorde, and legendary fighter jets.

items.title: Empire State Building
items.details: 86th Floor Observatory. CityPASS entry.

mapPlace.name: Empire State Building
mapPlace.address: 20 W 34th St, New York, NY 10001, United States
mapPlace.description: The world's most famous Art Deco skyscraper. Views from the 86th-floor open-air observatory are spectacular at night.

steps.title: Manhattan Districts & Madison Square Garden
steps.description: Matin/Midi: Chinatown, Little Italy, Tribeca, Joe's Pizza. Afternoon: Grand Central, Library, and shopping (Macy's, Aéropostale). Soir: Rooftop.

items.title: Madison Square Garden Tour
items.details: Explore the world's most famous arena.

mapPlace.name: Madison Square Garden
mapPlace.address: 4 Pennsylvania Plaza, New York, NY 10001, United States
mapPlace.description: Historic multi-purpose indoor arena in Midtown Manhattan, home to the NY Knicks and NY Rangers.

steps.title: Financial District & Amtrak to Washington
steps.description: Matin/Midi: Financial District, One World Trade Center, 9/11 Memorial. Afternoon: Head to Penn Station for the Amtrak train to Washington DC. Check-in to Courtyard Capitol.

items.title: One World Observatory
items.details: Observe Manhattan from the tallest building in the US.

mapPlace.name: One World Observatory
mapPlace.address: 117 West St, New York, NY 10007, United States
mapPlace.description: Observation deck spanning floors 100-102 of the One World Trade Center, offering high-speed SkyPod elevators and digital exhibits.

items.title: Amtrak Train 175 (NY to DC)
items.details: Depart Moynihan Train Hall at Penn Station at 7:52 PM, arrive Union Station at 11:15 PM. Reservation: 03BCDO. Ticket: 1150608565323. 4 Coach Seats.

items.title: Courtyard Washington, DC/U.S. Capitol
items.details: Check-in confirmation: 5020.606.472. PIN: 5090. Near U.S. Capitol and Union Station.

mapPlace.name: Courtyard Washington, DC/U.S. Capitol
mapPlace.address: 1325 2nd Street Northeast, Northeast, Washington, D.C., DC 20002, United States
mapPlace.description: Modern hotel in Northeast Washington, close to the U.S. Capitol and Union Station. Free high-speed WiFi and pool access.

steps.title: Washington DC Monuments Tour
steps.description: Visite: Capitol, Supreme Court, Washington Monument, White House, WWII, Lincoln & Jefferson Memorials.

items.title: US Capitol Tour
items.details: Guided tour of the crypt, rotunda, and National Statuary Hall.

mapPlace.name: United States Capitol
mapPlace.address: First St SE, Washington, DC 20004, United States
mapPlace.description: The home of the United States Congress and the seat of the legislative branch of the U.S. federal government.

steps.title: Flight Washington to Orlando
steps.description: Evening: Fly from Washington to Orlando. Check-in to Orlando hotel. City exploration.

items.title: Flight to Orlando (DCA to MCO)
items.details: JetBlue Flight B62523. Depart DCA 6:55 PM, arrive MCO 9:17 PM. Booking reference: RAMSUJ. Economy class.

items.title: La Quinta by Wyndham Orlando Universal area
items.details: Check-in confirmation: 5452.188.041. PIN: 6063. Free Shuttle to Universal.

mapPlace.name: La Quinta by Wyndham Orlando Universal area
mapPlace.address: 5621 Major Boulevard, Orlando, FL 32819, United States
mapPlace.description: Convenient hotel located near Universal Studios Orlando, offering a free shuttle, complimentary breakfast, and outdoor pool.

steps.title: Universal Epic Universe
steps.description: Full day at the brand-new Universal Epic Universe theme park. Mind-blowing new worlds.

items.title: Epic Universe Theme Park
items.details: Single-day dated ticket. Gates open at 9 AM.

steps.title: Busch Gardens Tampa & Mötley Crüe Concert
steps.description: Day: Thrill rides and animals at Busch Gardens Tampa. Evening: Mötley Crüe concert in Tampa.

items.title: Busch Gardens Tampa
items.details: Includes 1-day entry + free extra day.

mapPlace.name: Busch Gardens Tampa Bay
mapPlace.address: 10165 McKinley Dr, Tampa, FL 33612, United States
mapPlace.description: A 335-acre African-themed animal theme park featuring world-class roller coasters, animal habitats, and live shows.

items.title: Mötley Crüe Live Concert
items.details: Tampa Arena venue. Heavy metal night.

steps.title: Disney Hollywood Studios
steps.description: Full day exploring Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge and Tower of Terror at Disney's Hollywood Studios.

items.title: Disney Hollywood Studios
items.details: Park reservation confirmed. Star Wars rise of resistance early queue recommended.

steps.title: Kennedy Space Center & Bioluminescence
steps.description: Day: Rockets and shuttles at KSC. Rocket launch watch. Night: Bioluminescence Kayaking at Space Coast.

items.title: Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex
items.details: Explore Saturn V rocket and Space Shuttle Atlantis.

mapPlace.name: Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex
mapPlace.address: Space Commerce Way, Merritt Island, FL 32953, United States
mapPlace.description: Fascinating spaceport complex showcasing real spacecraft, simulated missions, astronaut interactions, and historical launch pads.

items.title: Bioluminescence Kayaking Tour
items.details: Paddle in glowing waters on the Space Coast. Mosquito spray mandatory.

steps.title: Space Coast & Cap Canaveral Beach
steps.description: Free exploration day in Cap Canaveral. Chill at Playalinda Beach, watch potential rocket launch.

steps.title: Drive to Miami & Everglades Airboat
steps.description: Morning: Drive to Miami. Afternoon: Airboating tour ($80) in the Everglades, Anhinga Trail walking to spot alligators. Night: Stay in Miami.

items.title: Everglades Airboat Tour & Wildlife Show
items.details: Ride across marshlands, spot wild alligators.

steps.title: Miami Beach & Key Largo Snorkeling
steps.description: Key Largo day trip. Coral reef snorkeling with equipment provided, then check in to hotel.

items.title: Coral Reef Snorkeling Tour
items.details: John Pennekamp Coral Reef State Park.

items.title: Park Royal Miami Beach Check-in
items.details: Check-in confirmation: 6004.977.142. PIN: 7917. Junior Suite for 4 adults. Kitchen included.

mapPlace.name: Park Royal Miami Beach
mapPlace.address: Indian Creek Drive 6495, Miami Beach, FL 33141, United States
mapPlace.description: Lovely beachside hotel with a swimming pool, junior suites, and fully equipped kitchens, minutes away from Miami Beach.

steps.title: Overseas Highway & Key West Sunset Snorkel
steps.description: Drive the Overseas Highway to Key West. Afternoon: Catamaran snorkeling on the reefs with drinks and sunset.

items.title: Key West Catamaran Reef Snorkel & Sunset
items.details: GetYourGuide booking. Drinks included post snorkel. Duration: ~3h.

steps.title: Key West Mangrove Kayak
steps.description: Morning: 2-hour kayak tour in Key West mangroves. Look out for lamantins, nurse sharks, and jellyfish.

items.title: Key West Mangrove Kayak Excursion
items.details: Single or tandem kayak options. Guided tour.

steps.title: Miami City & Little Havana
steps.description: Wynwood Walls in the morning, Cuban coffee and music in Little Havana in the afternoon.

steps.title: Beach Chill & Decathlon Snorkel
steps.description: Relaxation and swimming on South Beach. Bring Decathlon snorkel glasses.

steps.title: Everglades Shark Valley Bike Ride
steps.description: Rent bikes at Shark Valley and ride the 24km scenic loop. Check out of Miami hotel, drive to Key West.

items.title: Shark Valley Bike Rental
items.details: Rent bikes on-site (~$9/hour). Helmet recommended.

items.title: Hilton Garden Inn Key West
items.details: Check-in confirmation: 5988.356.037. PIN: 5464. Mobility and Hearing Access Queen Room.

mapPlace.name: Hilton Garden Inn Key West / The Keys Collection
mapPlace.address: 3850 Roosevelt Blvd, Key West, FL 33040, United States
mapPlace.description: Resort-style hotel on Key West offering beach lounger access, a heated outdoor pool, spacious rooms, and tiki bar.

steps.title: Coral Gables & Key Biscayne Light
steps.description: Matin: Venetian Pool in Coral Gables. Afternoon: Visit Cape Florida Lighthouse in Key Biscayne.

steps.title: Florida Outlets Shopping Day
steps.description: All day shopping at Dolphin Mall or Sawgrass Mills outlets.

steps.title: Miami Beach Departure
steps.description: Final packing. Airport transfer. Flight BF743 from Miami (MIA) at 11:05 PM to Paris Orly (ORY).

items.title: Flight BF743 (MIA to ORY)
items.details: Overnight flight to Paris Orly Terminal 4.

steps.title: Arrival in Paris
steps.description: Landing at Paris Orly Terminal 4 at 2:00 PM local time.
